findings.issue: Landing page headline reads 'VOLAURA: Verified Talent Platform' — reduces Atlas to single-product identity, contradicts Constitution v1.7 'one organism, five faces' principle.
findings.recommended_fix: Reframe as 'Atlas: One Mind, Five Skills' with subheader explaining assessment, focus, life sim, AI twin, swarm routing as integrated faces.
